message:
feat(python): numpy.linalg.vector_norm wrapper parity (franken_numpy-vgjf)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.linalg.vector_norm covering
axis, keepdims, and ord. Test covers L2 default (3,4)→5 exact, L1,
L-inf via np.inf, custom ord=3, 2-D axis=0/1, keepdims shape parity,
and integer-input float promotion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
